positive: A highly stylized, intricate composition featuring a crescent moon motif gently cradling a dense arrangement of fantastical, bioluminescent flora and ethereal geometric patterns. The style is a sophisticated fusion of Art Nouveau engraving and modern vector illustration. The composition must be perfectly centered, symmetrical, and designed for high contrast printing. Focus on clean silhouettes, bold black outlines, solid negative space, and elements that appear etched or carved onto a solid surface. The color palette is restricted to deep midnight blues, vibrant teal accents, and luminous gold highlights against a solid off-white background. Intricate details should read as scalable patterns, suitable for apparel transfer art, emphasizing symmetry and harmonious flow. Minimalist aesthetic, maximalist detail.
negative: low resolution, blurry, fuzzy, watermark, signature, text, logo, jpeg artifacts, gradient mess, painting style, photorealism, messy background, messy details, extra limbs, bad anatomy
